calendar.matters:
ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar May-25-2023 Off Calendar

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #1, Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Jun-01-2023 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Michael Woods appeared by zoom for Fintan Sullivan (administrator).

The court raised the issue of the $40,000.00 distribution that was made without court authority. Mr. Woods stated that it is his fault for not conveying that enough to his client, that his client gave his sister two installments of $8,000.00 because she needed it for moving costs, that his client distributed the same amounts/equal shares to himself and that $32,000.00 was given out. The court stated that it will let it slide considering the situation but going forward no distributions are to be made without prior court approval. The Petition for Final Distribution, etc. is under submission with the court's intent to allow the final account, but not approve it, and grant the remaining relief as prayed.

Judge: Stephen M. Murphy. Probate Examiner: Aeyoung Kim. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Cristobal. Not reported.
